docs.title: 品牌模块图片配置说明
概述
docs.text:
已为您的文档网站添加了完整的品牌模块展示功能。品牌模块包括：

  1. 主页品牌展示 - 在首页展示3个产品线
  2. 产品页面 - 详细的品牌和产品分类
  3. 手册页面 - 产品分类和搜索指南

docs.title: 📂 所需图片文件
docs.text: 请在 docs/assets/images/ 目录下添加以下图片文件：

docs.title: 必需图片
docs.text:
docs/assets/images/
├── brand-premium.png      # Premium Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）
├── brand-standard.png     # Standard Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）
└── brand-value.png        # Value Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）

docs.title: 图片建议规格
docs.text:
• 格式: PNG、JPG 或 WebP
  • 尺寸: 200x200px 至 400x400px
  • 大小: 每个文件建议不超过 100KB
  • 背景: 支持透明背景 (PNG)

docs.title: 1. 主页品牌展示
docs.text: 文件: docs/index.md 位置: Hero 部分下方 展示方式: 3列表格，包含图片和链接

docs.title: 2. 产品页面品牌模块
docs.text: 文件: docs/Products/index.md 位置: 页面顶部 展示方式: - Markdown 网格卡片（带链接和描述） - 每个品牌线包含功能列表

docs.title: 3. 手册页面
docs.text: 文件: docs/manuals/index.md 位置: 页面内容 展示方式: 分类卡片网格

docs.title: 修改图片路径
docs.text:
在 Markdown 中，通过以下方式引用图片：

![Premium Brand](../assets/images/brand-premium.png){ width="200" }

docs.title: 添加更多品牌线
docs.text:
在 docs/Products/index.md 中添加新的品牌部分：

-   <div class="goldse-card" markdown>
    ![Custom Brand](../assets/images/brand-custom.png){ width="200" }

    ### Custom Series
    Your product description here.

    [Learn More →](link)
    </div>

docs.title: 自定义样式
docs.text:
所有品牌模块的样式定义在： 

docs/stylesheets/custom.css

关键类名： - .brands-showcase - 主页品牌展示 - .brands-grid - 产品页品牌网格 - .goldse-card - 品牌卡片

docs.title: 📱 响应式设计
docs.text: 品牌模块已优化为响应式设计： - 桌面端: 3列布局 - 平板端: 2列布局 - 手机端: 1列布局

docs.title: 🚀 构建和预览
docs.text:
构建网站以查看品牌模块效果：

# 进入项目目录
cd c:\Users\Administrator\goldsea-manual\goldsea-manual

# 安装依赖（如需）
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 构建站点
mkdocs build

# 本地预览
mkdocs serve

访问 http://localhost:8000 查看结果。

docs.title: 📝 文件清单
docs.text:
已创建/更新的文件：

  • ✅ docs/index.md - 添加品牌展示模块
  • ✅ docs/Products/index.md - 新建产品页面
  • ✅ docs/manuals/index.md - 新建手册页面
  • ✅ docs/stylesheets/custom.css - 新增品牌样式

docs.title: 💡 最佳实践
docs.text:
1. 图片优化: 在上传前用图片编辑工具压缩图片
  2. 命名规范: 使用小写字母和连字符命名图片
  3. 替代文本: 始终为图片提供有意义的 alt 文本
  4. 一致性: 保持所有品牌图片的风格和尺寸一致
  5. 更新: 定期更新产品表格中的版本号和日期

docs.title: 图片不显示
docs.text:
• 检查文件名是否与 Markdown 中的引用完全匹配（区分大小写）
  • 确保图片文件在正确的目录: docs/assets/images/
  • 验证图片格式是否被支持

docs.title: 样式未应用
docs.text:
• 清除浏览器缓存
  • 重新构建网站: mkdocs build
  • 检查 CSS 文件是否被正确加载

更新时间: 2026-04-30 配置版本: 1.0

docs.title: About Goldse
docs.text: Goldse provides clear product information, practical documentation, and support resources for professional tools and equipment.

docs.title: Our Focus
docs.text: We help customers understand products quickly through organized manuals, concise product pages, and accessible support channels.

docs.title: What We Provide
docs.text:
• Product Information

    Clear product categories, feature summaries, and usage guidance.

  • Documentation

    Manuals, installation guides, maintenance notes, and troubleshooting resources.

  • Support Access

    A simple way for customers to reach the team for questions and service needs.

docs.title: Brand Values
docs.text:
• Clear and practical guidance
  • Reliable product information
  • Consistent support experience
  • Easy access across desktop and mobile devices

docs.title: Contact Us
docs.text: Have a product question, documentation request, or support need? Contact the Goldse team and we will help you find the right information.

docs.title: Support Topics
docs.text:
• Product Questions

    Ask about product features, specifications, or compatibility.

  • Manual Requests

    Request installation guides, user manuals, or technical documents.

  • Service Support

    Get help with troubleshooting, maintenance, and warranty-related questions.

docs.title: Contact Information
docs.text:
Please prepare your product model, purchase channel, and a brief description of your question before contacting support.

Email: support@goldseatool.com

docs.title: Goldse Tool Products
docs.text: Goldse is a fictional professional tool brand focused on compact, durable, and easy-to-use tools for home workshops, installation teams, creators, and light industrial users.

docs.title: Build a complete tool system
docs.text:
From precision measurement to cutting, fastening, power delivery, and jobsite organization, the Goldse tool family is designed to work as one connected kit.

Contact Sales View Manuals

docs.title: Featured Tool Lineup
docs.text:
Goldse VX-18 Smart Drill Driver

18V brushless drill for installation and assembly work

  • Brushless motor with 22 torque stages
  • Digital torque memory
  • Compact all-metal chuck
View product → Goldse CX-45 Compact Circular Saw

Cordless precision cutting for panels, trim, and site work

  • 45 mm max cut depth
  • Laser alignment guide
  • Dust extraction adapter
View product → Goldse LX-360 Laser Level

360° layout and alignment tool for interior projects

  • Green beam 360° projection
  • Self-leveling base
  • Magnetic wall bracket
View product → Goldse PX-120 Portable Power Station

Mobile power for tools, lighting, and field repairs

  • 1200W rated AC output
  • Tool battery charging ports
  • Smart thermal protection
View product → Goldse MT-9 Multi-Tool Kit

Nine-in-one oscillating toolkit for repair and finishing

  • Quick-change accessory head
  • Variable speed control
  • Wood, metal, and grout accessories
View product → Goldse WS-40 Workshop Storage System

Modular rolling storage for a complete tool setup

  • Stackable reinforced boxes
  • Rail-mounted organizers
  • Weather-resistant latches
View product →

docs.title: Tool Categories
docs.text: Category Products Best For Power Tools VX-18, CX-45, MT-9 Assembly, cutting, repair Measurement LX-360 Layout, leveling, installation Power & Jobsite PX-120 Mobile work, backup power Storage WS-40 Tool organization and transport

docs.title: Why choose the Goldse tool system?
docs.text:
• One visual product family for a professional storefront
  • Clear product pages, specs, manuals, and support paths
  • Expandable structure for future real products
  • Suitable for ecommerce, distributor catalogs, and documentation sites

docs.title: Clean cuts in a portable body
docs.text:
The CX-45 is a fictional cordless circular saw for cutting sheet goods, trim, softwood boards, and jobsite panels with controlled depth and clean visibility.

Request Quote View All Products

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• 45 mm maximum cut depth for common panel work
  • Brushless drive system for longer runtime
  • Integrated laser alignment for straight cuts
  • Bevel adjustment from 0° to 45°
  • Dust port adapter for cleaner indoor work
  • Soft-grip front handle for two-hand control

docs.title: Specifications
docs.text: Item Specification Blade Size 125 mm Max Cut Depth 45 mm at 90° Bevel Range 0°-45° Speed 5,200 RPM Weight 2.4 kg without battery Use Case Panels, trim, site cutting

docs.title: In the Box
docs.text:
• CX-45 Circular Saw
  • 125 mm carbide blade
  • Rip fence
  • Dust extraction adapter
  • Quick start guide

docs.title: Fast layout for walls, floors, and fixtures
docs.text:
The LX-360 is a fictional green-beam laser level designed for interior layout, cabinet alignment, tile setup, shelving, and electrical installation.

Request Quote View All Products

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• 360° horizontal laser line with vertical cross-line mode
  • High-visibility green beam for indoor jobsite work
  • Self-leveling mechanism with lock mode
  • Magnetic bracket for steel studs and mounts
  • USB-C charging for simple field charging
  • IP54 housing for dust and splash resistance

docs.title: Specifications
docs.text: Item Specification Laser Type Green beam Projection 360° horizontal + vertical line Accuracy ±2 mm at 10 m Working Range Up to 30 m indoor Power Rechargeable lithium battery Use Case Layout, leveling, alignment

docs.title: In the Box
docs.text:
• LX-360 Laser Level
  • Magnetic bracket
  • USB-C cable
  • Target plate
  • Carry pouch

docs.title: One compact tool for repair and finishing work
docs.text:
The MT-9 is a fictional oscillating multi-tool kit for cutting, scraping, sanding, trimming, and detail repair tasks around the workshop or jobsite.

Request Quote View All Products

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Quick-change accessory clamp for fast blade swaps
  • Variable speed control for wood, plastic, and metal
  • Low-vibration grip for detailed finishing
  • LED cut-line light for tight spaces
  • Dust extraction compatible sanding pad
  • Nine-piece accessory starter kit

docs.title: Specifications
docs.text: Item Specification Oscillation Angle 3.2° Speed Range 8,000-20,000 OPM Power Platform 18V Goldse tool battery Accessory Mount Universal quick-change Weight 1.1 kg without battery Use Case Repair, trim, sanding, scraping

docs.title: In the Box
docs.text:
• MT-9 Multi-Tool
  • Wood blade
  • Metal blade
  • Scraper blade
  • Sanding pad and sheets
  • Carry case

docs.title: Mobile power for tools and field repairs
docs.text:
The PX-120 is a fictional portable power station made for mobile installers, repair crews, outdoor workstations, and emergency tool charging.

Request Quote View All Products

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• 1200W rated AC output for common power tools
  • Dual tool-battery charging ports for Goldse platform packs
  • USB-C PD output for laptops and tablets
  • Smart thermal management for high-load work
  • Rugged carry frame with rubberized corners
  • LCD dashboard for runtime and load monitoring

docs.title: Specifications
docs.text: Item Specification Rated Output 1200W AC Peak Output 2400W surge Battery Capacity 1024Wh fictional pack Ports AC, USB-C, USB-A, DC, tool charging Weight 10.8 kg Use Case Mobile power, charging, field work

docs.title: In the Box
docs.text:

docs.title: Compact control for professional fastening
docs.text:
The VX-18 is a fictional 18V brushless drill driver built for installers, cabinet makers, maintenance teams, and serious DIY users who need repeatable torque control.

Request Quote View All Products

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• 18V brushless motor for efficient drilling and driving
  • 22-stage torque collar with digital memory mode
  • 13 mm all-metal chuck for secure bit holding
  • Two-speed gearbox for drilling and fastening
  • LED work light with 20-second delay
  • Compact body for cabinet and overhead work

docs.title: Specifications
docs.text: Item Specification Voltage 18V tool platform No-load Speed 0-520 / 0-1,850 RPM Max Torque 65 Nm Chuck 13 mm keyless metal chuck Weight 1.35 kg without battery Use Case Assembly, drilling, installation

docs.title: In the Box
docs.text:
• VX-18 Smart Drill Driver
  • Belt hook
  • Double-ended driver bit
  • Quick start guide

docs.title: Recommended Pairing
docs.text: Use with the PX-120 Portable Power Station for mobile charging and the WS-40 Workshop Storage System for organized transport.

docs.title: A modular home for the complete tool kit
docs.text:
The WS-40 is a fictional rolling storage system for carrying Goldse power tools, accessories, fasteners, batteries, and measurement tools in one organized stack.

Request Quote View All Products

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Stackable modular boxes with reinforced corners
  • Rolling base unit with telescoping handle
  • Small-parts organizer for bits, anchors, and fasteners
  • Weather-resistant latches for site transport
  • Tool rail inserts for repeatable organization
  • Label windows for quick identification

docs.title: Specifications
docs.text: Item Specification System Size 3-piece rolling stack Material Impact-resistant polymer Load Rating 40 kg fictional load capacity Wheels 7-inch rubberized wheels Protection Dust and splash resistant Use Case Transport, storage, organization

docs.title: In the Box

  • Small-parts organizer
